signup.title: Create Account

login.title: Login
login.subtitle: Hello, enter your information to access.

settings.title: Account Settings
settings.description2: Customize how you theams looks on your device.
settings.description4: Report problems with the app developer.

modalWarningAlert.title: ¡Warning!
modalWarningAlert.text_forgot_password: A password recovery email will be sent to you. Please ensure you are connected to the internet.
modalWarningAlert.text_write_email: Make sure to write your email.
modalWarningAlert.text_delete_user: Delete this user? This action cannot be undone.
modalWarningAlert.text_debt_payment: Add new payment? This action cannot be undone.
modalWarningAlert.text_complete_new_sale: Are you sure you want to complete the sale?
modalWarningAlert.text_delete_product: Delete this product? This action cannot be undone.

modalDangerAlert.title: ¡Danger!
modalDangerAlert.text_email_used: Email is already in use. Try a different one.
modalDangerAlert.text_phone_used: Phone number already in use.  Try a different one.
modalDangerAlert.text_img_invalid: Support images: JPEG, JPG, PNG or WebP.
modalDangerAlert.text_img_large: The image file is too large. Maximum size is 2MB.
modalDangerAlert.text_not_internet: Make sure have an internet conecction.
modalDangerAlert.text_not_credit_sale: This is not a valid credit amount.
modalDangerAlert.text_not_customer_select: Please select a customer to proceed with a credit sale.
modalDangerAlert.text_category_used: Category already exists in the system.
modalDangerAlert.text_not_category_select: Please select a category to proceed whit a add new product.
modalDangerAlert.text_code_sku_used: Code SKU is already in use. Try a different one.
modalDangerAlert.text_used_product: This product has transaction history and cannot be deleted as a creation error.
modalDangerAlert.text_missing_columns: The following required columns are missing: {{columns}}
modalDangerAlert.text_empty_products: No product to insert into the system.
modalDangerAlert.text_code_sku_used_import: Code SKU: {{codesku}} is already in use.

modalQuestionAlert.title: ¡Warning!
modalQuestionAlert.error_quantity: I made a mistake entering the initial quantity.
modalQuestionAlert.text_loss_stock: Stock removed due to physical damage, expiration or loss.
modalQuestionAlert.export_page: Do you want to export the current page or all data?
modalQuestionAlert.text_current_view: Only data visible on this page.
modalQuestionAlert.text_total_data: All available data in the system.

modalAddUser.title: Add new user
modalAddUser.description: Add individual users for your app.
modalAddUser.subtitle: Enter the main information of your new user.

modalChangePassword.title: Change Password
modalChangePassword.subtitle: Enter your current password and new password.

modalContact.title: Contact Support
modalContact.description: Send a message describing the error o issue.
modalContact.subtitle: Enter your message and our support team will review it as soon as possible.

modalAddCustomer.title: Add new customer
modalAddCustomer.description: Add individual clients to your customer list.
modalAddCustomer.subtitle: Enter the main information of your new customer

modalAddProduct.title: Add new product
modalAddProduct.description: Add individual products to your product list.
modalAddProduct.subtitle: Enter the main information of your new product.
modalAddProduct.subtitle_edit: Edit the main information of your product.

modalAddCategory.title: Add new category
modalAddCategory.description: Add news categories to your products.
modalAddCategory.subtitle: Enter the main information of your new category.

modalNewPayment.title: New payment
modalNewPayment.description: Register new payment of your customer.
modalNewPayment.subtitle: Ensure all fields are correctly filled before saving.

modalEditUser.title: Edit this user
modalEditUser.description: Edit individual users for your app.
modalEditUser.subtitle: Replace the new information for your user.

modalExport.title: Export statistics
modalExport.description: Data will be exported in a <bold>.csv</bold>, <bold>.xlsx</bold> and <bold>.pdf</bold> file.
modalExport.subtitle: Choose yout favorite configuration.
modalExport.text_statistics_description: Do you want to include statistics in the file?

modalImport.title: Import your products
modalImport.description: Data will be exported in a <bold>.csv</bold> or <bold>.xlsx</bold> file.
modalImport.subtitle: Your file must include the following columns.
modalImport.categories: (Categories must match the categories in the system)
modalImport.text_number_columns: Prices or Stock values must be valid numbers.
